Form input has no label

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Page has no main landmark

<body>

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="search w-input" data-name="Field 2" fs-cmsfilter-field="*" id="field-2" maxlength="256" name="field-2" placeholder="Search within category" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'radio' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input data-name="Radio 8" id="radio-8" name="radio" style="opacity:0;position:absolute;z-index:-1" type="radio" value="Radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>

MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="icon-button small-button filter-dropdown vacancies_filter-button sorting w-select" data-name="Sorting" fs-cmssort-element="trigger" fs-cmssort-type="date" id="Sorting" name="Sorting"><o
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="search w-input" data-name="Field 2" fs-cmsfilter-field="*" id="field-2" maxlength="256" name="field-2" placeholder="Search within category" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'radio' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input data-name="Radio 8" id="radio-8" name="radio" style="opacity:0;position:absolute;z-index:-1" type="radio" value="Radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="dropdown-list w-dropdown-list" id="cityTarget"><div class="w-dyn-list"><div class="w-dyn-items" id="docuList" role="list"><div class="w-dyn-item" role="listitem"><div class="w-embed"><labe
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Form input has no label

Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="search w-input" data-name="Field 2" fs-cmsfilter-field="*" id="field-2" maxlength="256" name="field-2" placeholder="Search within category" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Radio/checkbox group 'radio' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

Form input has no label

Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="search w-input" data-name="Field 2" fs-cmsfilter-field="*" id="field-2" maxlength="256" name="field-2" placeholder="Search within category" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Avvik: 33 | Bestått: 0
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name (×20 across article pages)

<svg height="29.938" viewbox="0 0 59.666 29.938" width="59.666" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <defs> <clippath id="clip-path"> <rect data-name="Rectang
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3 (×2 across article pages)

<h3 class="margin-0 margin-bottom-15px">Contact form</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'Accepted' not wrapped in fieldset with legend (×2 across article pages)

<input data-name="Accepted" id="accept" name="Accepted" required="" style="opacity:0;position:absolute;z-index:-1" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark (×2 across article pages)

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'DOF Group - Go to homepage' (×2 across article pages)

<a aria-label="DOF Group - Go to homepage" class="dof-logo-wrapper w-inline-block" href="/"><div class="dof-logo w-embed"><svg height="29.938" viewbox="0 0 59.666 29.938" width="59.666" xmlns="http://
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication (×58 across article pages)

<a href="/what-we-do/integrated-subsea-services" style="position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; z-index: 2;" target="_blank"><span style="display:none">Subsea services</span></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL (×4 across article pages)

<a href="https://www.dof.com">www.dof.com</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link) (×8 across article pages)

<a class="blue-link w-dyn-bind-empty" href="#" id="w-node-b93e72f1-59b8-a6b7-782c-b4a7ac29c14c-a537ecfa"></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label (×20 across article pages)

<input class="text-field w-input" data-name="Full name" id="name" maxlength="256" name="Full-name" placeholder="Full name*" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'full-name' missing autocomplete attribute (×4 across article pages)

<input class="text-field w-input" data-name="Full name" id="name" maxlength="256" name="Full-name" placeholder="Full name*" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'company-name' missing autocomplete attribute (×4 across article pages)

<input class="text-field w-input" data-name="Company name" id="company" maxlength="256" name="Company-name" placeholder="Company name (optional)" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email-2' missing autocomplete attribute (×4 across article pages)

<input class="text-field w-input" data-name="Email 2" id="email-2" maxlength="256" name="email-2" placeholder="Email*" required="" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'phone-2' missing autocomplete attribute (×4 across article pages)

<input class="text-field w-input" data-name="Phone 2" id="phone-2" maxlength="256" name="phone-2" placeholder="Phone (optional)" type="tel"/>
Add autocomplete='tel' to help users fill in the form

MODERATE
